data.title: Kodiak Sciences Announces Recent Business Highlights and Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, on March 31, 2026, Kodiak Sciences Inc. (Nasdaq: KOD) released an update on its recent achievements and financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The company stated that its progress has been notable, with significant developments in the Phase 3 trials.

data.title: Nomadar Secures $2M in 2026 Revenue, More Than Doubling 2025
data.description: Nomadar, a leading global sports development and technology platform listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol NOMA, revealed its annual financial results for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, headquartered in Marshall, Texas, shared its corporate highlights alongside the financial performance in a recent announcement on March 31, 2026.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK FINANCIAL OPPORTUNITIES FUND NOTICE TO SHAREHOLDERS - SOURCES OF DISTRIBUTION UNDER SECTION 19(a)
data.description: Today, in Boston, on March 31, 2026, the John Hancock Financial Opportunities Fund (NYSE: BTO) revealed details regarding its quarterly distribution. Managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, the Fund shared the sources of the distribution for the quarter.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK DIVERSIFIED INCOME FUND NOTICE TO SHAREHOLDERS - SOURCES OF DISTRIBUTION UNDER SECTION 19(a)
data.description: Today, in Boston on March 31, 2026, the John Hancock Diversified Income Fund (NYSE: HEQ), a closed-end fund overseen by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and operated by Wellington Management Company LLP, disclosed the origins of its funding.

data.title: Dycom Industries, Inc. Appoints Company Veteran Bo Gresham as its First Chief Revenue Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on March 31, 2026, Dycom Industries, Inc. disclosed the selection of James “Bo” Gresham as their inaugural Chief Revenue Officer (CRO), commencing March 30, 2026. As the CRO, Mr. Gresham will spearhead Dycom’s consolidated revenue sector, concentrating on enhancing strategic market growth and fortifying ties with essential stakeholders to pave the way for Dycom’s future development. Dycom Industries, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DY.

data.title: Statement from National Press Club President Mark Schoeff Jr. on reports of American journalist Shelly Kittleson's abduction in Iraq
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Washington, it was reported that American journalist Shelly Kittleson was abducted in Baghdad. This incident has raised serious concerns as journalists should not be subjected to such actions. The call for her prompt and secure release highlights the importance of press freedom.

data.title: COLERIDGE'S 6TH ANNUAL NATIONAL CONFERENCE CENTERS ON THE IMPORTANCE OF COLLABORATION ACROSS BORDERS
data.description: A recent event in Washington aimed to foster connections and enhance decision-making processes. Coleridge organized its 6th Annual National Conference in Arlington, VA, from March 24-27, which brought together around 250 data experts, policymakers, and thought leaders from 39 different fields. The conference focused on bridging divides and accelerating the pace of decision making.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK PREMIUM DIVIDEND FUND NOTICE TO SHAREHOLDERS - SOURCES OF DISTRIBUTION UNDER SECTION 19(a)
data.description: Today, in Boston, the John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund (NYSE: PDT), a closed-end fund overseen by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, disclosed the origins of its monthly distribution amounting to $0.0825.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK TAX-ADVANTAGED DIVIDEND INCOME FUND NOTICE TO SHAREHOLDERS - SOURCES OF DISTRIBUTION UNDER SECTION 19(a)
data.description: In Boston on March 31, 2026, the John Hancock Tax-Advantaged Dividend Income Fund (NYSE: HTD), a closed-end fund overseen by John Hancock Investment Management LLC with subadvisory support from Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, revealed details regarding the sources of its monthly income distribution.

data.title: GeoPark Announces the Filing of Its Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia, GeoPark Limited, a prominent independent energy company in Latin America, has submitted its Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). With over 20 years of experience in the industry, GeoPark is listed on the NYSE under the symbol GPRK. The Form 20-F is now available for viewing on the SEC's website at www.sec.gov or on GeoPark's website under the "Invest with Us" section at www.geo-.

data.title: Chainalysis will introduce 'blockchain intelligence' agents to platform, with rollout starting this summer for investigations.
data.description: The analytics platform announced plans to gradually release the agents during the summer for utilization in investigations and compliance purposes.

data.title: BTC rose to $68K on optimism of US-Israel-Iran conflict resolution, but bearish sentiment from futures traders persists.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged to $68,000 amidst positive market reactions to the potential resolution of the conflict between the US and Israel-Iran. However, data indicates that futures traders remain skeptical about the rally.

data.title: Never Miss a Notification from Illinois American Water
data.description: Please update your contact details today to stay informed about emergency and general service alerts in BELLEVILLE, Illinois. Illinois American Water is advising customers to log in to their MyWater online portal and ensure their information is up to date. This will help in receiving important notifications promptly.

data.title: Kulani Kinis x Oceanus: At The After Party
data.description: Sydney, March 31, 2026 - Kulani Kinis and Oceanus recently announced their collaboration on a limited capsule collection named At The After Party. The two female-founded brands, originating from Australia and Britain, have joined forces with a common design objective after both establishing a strong presence in the fashion industry. This partnership brings together their unique aesthetics and expertise to craft a special collection that resonates with their global audience.

data.title: Kirby Corporation Announces Date for 2026 First Quarter Earnings Release and Earnings Webcast
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Kirby Corporation (NYSE: KEX) is scheduled to release its first quarter results for 2026 at 6:00 a.m. CDT on April 30, 2026. Following the announcement, an earnings conference call webcast is set to take place at 7:30 a.m. CDT. Investors and stakeholders should mark their calendars for these important updates from Kirby.
Iran: A meteorological radar in Bushehr has been hit again in US-Israeli strikes - ISNA.

data.title: POET Technologies Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In its latest report released on March 31, 2026, POET Technologies Inc. (TSX Venture: PTK; NASDAQ: POET) disclosed its audited consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The company specializes in designing and developing Photonic Integrated Circuits (PICs), light sources, and optical modules for the AI and data center sectors. All financial data is presented in United States dollars (USD) and can be accessed on SEDAR+.

data.title: Micron Announces the Pricing of the Cash Tender Offers for Any and All of Certain Outstanding Senior Notes
data.description: Micron Technology, Inc. revealed the Reference Yield and Notes Consideration for cash tender offers on March 31, 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: MU, disclosed details of the offers for various note series. The tender offers, collectively known as the "Tender Offers," include different series of notes, with specific terms outlined in the table provided by the company. This announcement signifies an important financial move by Micron in its ongoing operations.

data.title: Titanium Announces Closing of Plan of Arrangement
data.description: In Bolton, Ontario, on March 31, 2026, Titanium Transportation Group Inc. (TSX: TTNM, OTCQX: TTNMF), a leading provider of transportation and logistics services across North America, has successfully finalized its plan of arrangement under the Canada Business Corporations Act.
